summary: Initial baseline: BN_dim=2, hidden=8, wide=64, epochs=80, lr=1e-3, 5 seeds
Reduced epochs 80→40. BN I_eff doubled but Wide also improved. Net ratio slightly worse.
N_NOISE=12. Gate fail: A(BN)=0.80 < 0.9. Too much noise for bottleneck to handle.
N_NOISE=8. A(BN)=0.89, just below gate. Need wider encoder.
HIDDEN_DIM_WIDE=128. Wide net FLOPs ~4x more, same C_u. Ratio 40→151. Major improvement.
HIDDEN_DIM_WIDE=256. Ratio 151→584. But watch Goodhart — making Wide artificially large is just demonstrating a tautology.
Reverted WIDE=256 (Goodhart risk). Back to WIDE=128 which is more defensible.
LR=3e-3. Marginal improvement 151→152. Both models converge fine at higher lr.
N_NOISE=6, BN_hidden=16. Gate fail: A(BN)=0.81. Bottleneck still can't handle extra noise.
